历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science from 2021-2023 and Physics Category from 2024-2025) were approximately 6693 → 1021 → 5304 → 3660 → 2692, showing significant fluctuations; in 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, rankings shifted abnormally forward, and after 2023, they gradually rebounded, with a baseline of about 2692 in 2025, cumulatively moving forward by about 968 places in the last two years; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 191 → 196 → 206 → 203 → 205, showing a slight overall increase; in 2026, the Physics Category plan is 151 and the Medical Category plan is 58, totaling 209, an increase of about 2% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 9th on the main list of the 2026 Soft Science Rankings (Top 10), with stable rankings at 8th-9th in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is generally positive, mainly involving positive events such as the cafeteria ranking first nationally and high enrollment transparency; Douyin popularity ranking 22nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications; 17 A-class disciplines including Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Clinical Medicine A-, with outstanding engineering and medical strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at HUST such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; in 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025, with an estimated 269,000 Physics Category candidates, intensifying competition; in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 370 points, and the special type line was 495 points, remaining stable in recent years; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a core city in the central region, which has strong appeal to Guangxi candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Guangxi (Physics Category + Medical Category about 209 people), with a stable cross-provincial enrollment proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2692, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 2% (easing competition), the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates of about 3.3% (intensifying competition), and the generally positive reputation and popularity (intensifying competition), the effects of expansion and candidate increase largely offset each other, with reputation and popularity slightly dominating; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2684, with a range of 2362 to 3006.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 华中科技大学在广西医学类近五年最低录取位次波动较大：2021年12270名（计划39人）、2022年骤升至979名（计划41人）、2023年回落至6648名（计划45人）、2024年回升至4 793名（计划57人）、2025年再次回落至7166名（计划67人）。2026年医学类招生计划为58人，较2025年的67人减少9人，缩招幅度约13.4%，对位次产生上行压力（更难进）。整 体来看，该校医学类在广西的招生规模逐年扩大后首次出现缩减，供需关系趋紧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其同济医学院是国内顶尖的医学院校之一， 医学学科实力雄厚，临床医学、公共卫生等专业享有极高声誉，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。华中科技大学同济医学院位于武汉，地处华中地区中心城市，区位优势明显。广西本省 医学类招生规模相对有限，优质医学教育资源稀缺，考生报考省外顶尖医学院校的意愿较强，进一步推高了竞争程度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势分析，2026年华中科技大学在广西医学类最低录取位次预测为6619名，较2025年的7166名有所上升（更难进），主要受招生计划缩减影响。 波动区间为6420至6818名，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Guangxi's medical category have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 12,270 in 2021 (plan: 39 students), sharply rising to 979 in 2022 (plan: 41), falling back to 6,648 in 2023 (plan: 45), rising again to 4,793 in 2024 (plan: 57), and falling again to 7,166 in 2025 (plan: 67). The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 58 students, a decrease of 9 from 2025's 67, a reduction of about 13.4%, exerting upward pressure on rankings (harder to enter). Overall, the university's medical enrollment scale in Guangxi has expanded year by year but now sees its first reduction, tightening supply-demand dynamics.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected for the Double First-Class initiative, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with strong medical disciplines, and its clinical medicine, public health, and other majors enjoy a very high reputation, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance exams, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Tongji Medical College is located in Wuhan, a central city in the central China region, with obvious geographical advantages. Guangxi's own medical enrollment scale is relatively limited, and high-quality medical education resources are scarce, so candidates have a strong willingness to apply to top medical schools outside the province, further increasing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and analysis of historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in Guangxi in 2026 is 6,619, an increase (harder to enter) compared to 2025's 7,166, mainly due to the reduction in enrollment plan. The fluctuation range is 6,420 to 6,818. It is recommended that candidates plan their applications within this range.
